name: Cricket Superstar
author: Poki
description: The stadiums are full, and the crowd cannot wait for the next round of cricket! Cricket Superstar is an intense athletic game where your perception and reflexes are tested extensively. There are matches with different difficulty settings, so no matter if you're a newcomer to the sport, or an experienced pro, there will be a game mode for your liking. You can select your favorite team from different countries across the entire globe, and compete in various championships. Can you become the ultimate Cricket Superstar? How do I play Cricket Superstar? Click and drag with your mouse to the left or to the right at the correct time to hit the ball! The more precise you are, the better your score will be. Who created Cricket Superstar? Cricket Superstar is created by Tech Priyam. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Cricket Superstar for free? You can play Cricket Superstar for free on Poki. Can I play Cricket Superstar on mobile devices and desktop? Cricket Superstar can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
